nodes.name: Gmail Trigger
nodes.notes: Watches the 'invoice-inbox' Gmail label every 5 minutes for new unread messages. downloadAttachments=true fetches the raw binary of each attachment so we can forward it to GPT-4o. Create this label in Gmail and set up a filter to apply it to incoming invoices.

nodes.name: Has Attachment?
nodes.notes: Skip emails that have no attachments — this avoids wasting OpenAI API calls on text-only notifications or newsletters that land in the label by mistake. The 'true' branch continues; the 'false' branch ends silently.

nodes.name: Split Attachments
nodes.notes: Processes one attachment at a time. Some invoices arrive with both a PDF and a cover image in the same email — splitting ensures each attachment gets its own row in the output sheet rather than being grouped together.

nodes.name: OpenAI — Extract Invoice
nodes.notes: Sends the attachment binary (PDF or image) to GPT-4o via the OpenAI Responses API. Uses a strict JSON schema response_format so the model is constrained to return exactly the fields we need — no free-form prose. The EXTRACTION_PROMPT workflow variable holds the full prompt text (set it in n8n → Variables). Timeout is 60s to accommodate large multi-page PDFs.

nodes.name: Parse & Classify
nodes.notes: Unwraps the OpenAI Responses API envelope, parses the strict JSON payload, and computes the 'needs_review' boolean. Rule: needs_review = true if confidence != 'high' OR if invoice_number, vendor_name, or total_amount is null. Also serialises line_items to a JSON string for single-cell storage in Google Sheets, and attaches email metadata (sender, subject, filename) for the audit trail.

nodes.name: Needs Review?
nodes.notes: Branches on the needs_review flag computed by the previous Code node. 'true' branch → Needs Review sheet + warning Slack message. 'false' branch → main Invoices sheet + success Slack message.

nodes.name: Sheets — Append Invoice
nodes.notes: Appends a new row to the 'Invoices' tab of your Google Sheet. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with the Sheet ID from the URL (the long string between /d/ and /edit). The sheet must have a header row matching these column names — see the README for the exact schema.

nodes.name: Sheets — Needs Review
nodes.notes: Appends rows that need human review to the 'Needs Review' tab. Includes a review_reason column explaining why it was flagged (e.g. 'confidence=medium' or 'missing: invoice_number'). A team member should check this tab regularly and either correct the data or reprocess the attachment.

nodes.name: Slack — Processed ✅
nodes.notes: Posts a success summary to your Slack channel after a high-confidence invoice is written to the main sheet. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID with the channel ID (right-click channel in Slack → Copy link → the C... string at the end).

nodes.name: Slack — Needs Review ⚠️
nodes.notes: Sends a warning to Slack when an invoice couldn't be processed with high confidence. Includes the reason for flagging and a pointer to the Needs Review sheet. A team member should action this within 1 business day to avoid payment delays.
